query: I'm helping you plan a 7-day trip for two people from North Platte to Colorado, exploring three cities, starting from March 20 to March 26, 2022. The trip allocation would be a budget of $6,500. When it comes to lodging, we prefer accommodations where parties are allowed, and non-shared rooms are a must for us. As for transportation, we're aiming to exclude flight options.

plan.current_city: from North Platte to Grand Junction
plan.transportation: self-driving, from North Platte to Grand Junction, duration: 7 hours 27 mins, distance: 809 km, cost: 40
plan.attraction: Museum of the West, Museums of Western Colorado; Eureka! McConnell Science Museum; Bananas Fun Park;
plan.accommodation: Clean sunny park slope apartment, Colorado Springs

plan.attraction: Western Colorado Botanical Gardens; Canyon View Park; James M. Robb - Colorado River State Park;
plan.accommodation: Clean sunny park slope apartment, Colorado Springs
